channel.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India
channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.
channel.copyright: Copyright:(C) Sat, 23 May 2026 19:26:00 IST Bennett Coleman & Co. Ltd, http://in.indiatimes.com/policyterms/1554651.cms

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: Indian-origin worker killed by falling branch in NZ, wife left 'completely alone'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Indian national charged after alleged $5.6m pseudoephedrine import bust at Sydney port
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif begins 4-day China visit amid fragile US-Iran truce
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: New Green Card rule: Sridhar Vembu slammed for asking Indian visa holders to come back home, to choose self-respect
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: China mine blast: Death toll rises to 90; Beijing orders crackdown as rescue ops continue — top developments
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Fast-developing emergency': 1 killed, several injured after fire, explosions at New York City Shipyard
item.description: A devastating fire at a New York City shipyard ignited two powerful explosions, claiming one life and injuring at least 36, including brave firefighters and first responders. The "complex, fast-developing emergency" saw crews battling flames late into the night after the blasts rocked the area. Investigations into the cause are underway.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Uganda confirms 3 new Ebola cases as WHO warns against underestimating outbreak risk
item.description: Uganda has confirmed three new Ebola cases, bringing the total to five in the current outbreak. The new infections include a driver and a health worker exposed to the first patient, along with a woman from the Democratic Republic of Congo. Authorities are intensifying contact tracing efforts to contain the spread of the rare Bundibugyo strain.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: ‘I will kill you Jews’: Man who threatened to blow up Jewish schools jailed for 5 years in UK
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: King Charles surprises audience at Kenneth Branagh’s sold-out Shakespeare show in Stratford-upon-Avon
item.description: King Charles III made a surprise appearance at a sold-out Royal Shakespeare Company performance of The Tempest, delighting theatregoers. He sat amongst the public, not in a royal box, turning a regular evening into a memorable royal moment. The visit highlights his patronage of the arts and adds significant buzz to Kenneth Branagh's acclaimed performance.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: World’s most powerful economies by 2030: Prediction reveals future global leaders
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Inside China’s 113-metre deep undersea tunnel: How a mega rail project could rewrite high-speed travel
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: The Nile’s hidden shift over 4,000 years may have saved an entire ancient African city and preserved Napata for thousands of years
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Over 80 killed in gas explosion at coal mine in China’s Shanxi province
item.description: A devastating gas explosion at the Liushenyu coal mine in northern China's Shanxi province has claimed the lives of at least 90 miners. The blast occurred Friday evening, with carbon monoxide levels reportedly exceeding limits prior to the incident. Rescue operations are ongoing as President Xi Jinping has ordered a full-scale rescue and a thorough investigation.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: London stabbing: Five men injured in violent altercation, one arrested
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Poor thing': Iran mocks Donald Trump as viral buffalo resembling him loses appetite
item.description: Iran's official account in Russia shared a viral video of a Bangladeshi albino buffalo resembling Donald Trump, claiming the animal lost its appetite due to the comparison amid ongoing US-Iran conflict. The buffalo, named 'Donald Trump', has become a local attraction ahead of Eid al-Adha festivities.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Revenge matter of time': IRGC-trained Iraqi arrested over assassination plot against Donald Trump's daughter Ivanka
item.description: An IRGC-trained operative, allegedly seeking revenge for Qasem Soleimani's death, was arrested in Turkey and extradited to the US. Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi is accused of plotting to assassinate Ivanka Trump, even possessing a blueprint of her Florida home. He reportedly made threats against Americans online.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Watch: SpaceX Starship bursts into flames during fiery Indian Ocean splashdown after test flight
item.description: SpaceX's Starship rocket completed its 12th test flight with a controlled splashdown in the Indian Ocean, despite engine malfunctions and a booster issue. The massive spacecraft deployed mock satellites during its high-risk mission. This crucial test flight advances SpaceX's lunar ambitions for NASA's Artemis program and comes amid reports of a potential IPO.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: YouTuber Danny Go’s son Isaac Coleman’s cause of death: Inside the 14-year-old’s battle with rare illness
item.description: YouTuber Danny Go, whose real name is Daniel Coleman, announced the death of his 14-year-old son Isaac Coleman on May 21, 2026. Isaac had Fanconi anemia, a rare genetic disorder, and was later diagnosed with mouth cancer in 2025. In an emotional tribute, Danny praised his son’s strength, joy, and resilience through years of health struggles. Fans and fellow creators flooded social media with condolences and support for the grieving family.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: ChudTheBuilder may be released after reported $1M bond offer from crypto casino “Duel”
item.description: A significant development in the ChudTheBuilder case sees a crypto gambling platform, Duel, reportedly offering to pay his $1 million bond. This unexpected financial backing for the individual facing serious charges linked to a courthouse shooting has ignited widespread online discussion. The court is yet to confirm the bond's acceptance, leaving many to speculate on the platform's motives.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: YouTube star Danny Go mourns heartbreaking loss of 14-year-old son Isaac
item.description: YouTube sensation Danny Go, known as Daniel Coleman, shared the heartbreaking news of his 14-year-old son Isaac's passing after a battle with cancer. Coleman expressed profound grief, celebrating Isaac's strength and joy despite his health challenges. The family, including wife Mindy, focused on creating cherished memories during Isaac's final months, leaving fans worldwide deeply saddened.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy
